notes: v2.2.0 introduces MULTIPLE HUD CONTEXTS. A title's UI has distinct screens that expose different signals at different bboxes; a single flat region map can't represent them. Each context declares its own regions; the OCR pipeline / adapter selects the context by the on-screen state.
live_gameplay = the in-play HUD (v2.1.0 center-clustered scorebug + down/distance), present during snaps in every mode. Coords unchanged from v2.1.0. See ADR 0013.

play_call = the pre-snap play-call / formation-select overlay that displays the offensive formation NAME as text. Present in Practice play-select and human-played gameplay; ABSENT in CPU-vs-CPU (the CPU picks off-screen). Added because single-frame CNN formation classification from the live gameplay camera ceilinged at ~0.22 macro-F1 (12 training runs); reading the game's own formation label is far more reliable. See ADR 0014.
This multi-context shape is the reusable pattern for future title adapters (CFB 26, NBA 2K26, EA FC 26): live-gameplay HUD vs menu/overlay screens each get a context.

sources.live_gameplay: agents/capture/fixtures/real/madden26_<matchup>.mp4 (10 CPU-vs-CPU clips, 2026-06-25..27); see v2.1.0 notes below

live_gameplay_notes: Center-clustered scorebug, not the v2.0.0 left-anchored broadcast bar (element drift +213..+304px scoreboard, -449..-854px down/distance). See ADR 0013.
distance bbox renders 'KICKOFF'/'GOAL' on special/goal-line snaps; OCR state-classifies.
field_position bbox excludes the leading possession-arrow glyph. Scores use a large italic numeral that OCRs weakly on some 2-digit values (known-weak, ADR 0013).
play_call_notes: formation_name is the centered '<Formation Name> - N Plays' banner (white-on-dark). The full Madden name (e.g. 'Trips TE Offset', 'Ace Double Wing') is the primary label; a canonical-8 family tag is derived via keyword mapping (leading family word). Parse the name before '- N Plays'; the bbox height (32px) excludes the play-art jersey numbers below (~y655).
Feasibility (2026-06-30): 100% (40/40) on the 8 canonical practice clips, avg conf 0.82; production-confirmed on the human exhibition clip (7/7 play-call screens read, same bbox).
Ambiguous single-word families ('Pro','Strong') are unique within the v0.1 canonical 8; the full 24-formation taxonomy (v0.3) will add left-panel family disambiguation.

live_gameplay.description: In-play HUD (v2.1.0 center scorebug + down/distance sub-row). Present during snaps.

play_call.description: Pre-snap play-call / formation-select overlay. Displays the offensive formation NAME as text. Present in Practice play-select + human-played gameplay; absent in CPU-vs-CPU.

formation_name.note: Centered '<Formation Name> - N Plays' banner, white-on-dark. Primary output = full name; secondary = canonical-8 family via keyword map. See ADR 0014.
